visual_description: Two men sit at a table in a dimly lit, cluttered room; one wears a patterned shirt and holds a cigarette, the other wears a dark jacket and leans toward him. The man in the patterned shirt looks up at the other, who gazes back with his head slightly tilted. In the background, another person is partially visible, seated and smoking, with a chalkboard covered in writing behind them.
